description: Native English (American). Male, late 20s. Premium, polished. Persona: charming idle heir. Emotion: warm, breezy, unbothered. A warm, fluent, easy baritone with the placeless private-school non-accent of enclave media; relaxed pacing, casual superlatives, soft easy laughs, every sentence settling back on its heels like nothing has ever once been urgent.
text: [warm] Hey, relax... it's handled, genuinely. The lake at sunset, the good table, all of it. [laughs] No, the best table. Don't worry about any of it, that's my whole job. It always works out.
